productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Astride Brown Sports Shoes
description: The adidas Astride athletic shoe is a great everyday wear shoe that combines style with comfort. The go-to appeal of this pair has made it one of the most popular adidas shoes. Wear this for your morning jog, a walk in the park, and it also doubles as an extremely stylish, lightweight casual sneaker! Upper Nubuck upper with synthetic overlays adidas 3-Stripe overlays at the mid-foot region Highly padded fabric collar Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Haul loop on back heel Central lace-ups Padded tongue with branding Midsole AdiPrene in the midsole to protect your feet from the shock of impact Outsole TPU outsole with patterned grooves and strategically placed cleats suitable for rough terrain Traxion technology on the outsole and Speedgrip groove at the heel for optimum control when running at speed Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
